title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Sanji, Shanks, Kid, Unknown person #5, Lilith as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: *Third!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: *Slash!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The Seraphim aren't stopping!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have no choice but to deal with them through friendly fire!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Even just as kids...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Their futures will be terrifying...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Regarding that ability, vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: That snotty kid jinbei's ability!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's the swim-swim fruit ability, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the ability of my brother-in- arms, senior pink from the Donquixote family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In this world, there are no two devil fruits' that are the same! Don't tell me he's deadi?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you noticed it? The one you're referring to is a convict in Impel down right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then, are you saying you recreated the same devil fruit?

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: When it comes to artificial devil fruits,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only the Zoan type can be manu- factured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just like Caesar's outrageous smile...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah, that person should just die already.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I have a large amount of money and time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "special" fruits can also be reproduced, although, whether you can "awaken" them is still unconfirmed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Regarding the Logia-type, I've done all I can, but reproducing those is very difficult.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, in the case of the Paramecia-type, I found that if you can get a hold of the user's "lineage factor",

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can refine a special blood type and administer it, which will help acquire that user's ability.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is the blood flowing through their bodies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I call it, "Green Blood"!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: You created that blood?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: mero memo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Mellow!!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
